data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Warranty tracking on parts and labor', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions warranty details, there is no specific evidence provided that demonstrates how the system tracks warranties for both parts and labor. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the fulfillment of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of warranty tracking for parts and labor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for warranty tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify warranty tracking for parts and labor.
